title: Triflorensia ixoroides

The plant is classified under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Triflorensia ixoroides is further classified into the family Rubiaceae, subfamily Rubioideae, and tribe Rubieae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
